jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Vestian - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Vestian in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vestian:
Vestian is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vestian!
